acceptance_criteria.description: Report synthesis runs → LLM generates findings → Each finding has summary field (80-150 chars)
Source content available → Summary generated → Summary captures key insight accurately
acceptance_criteria.test_function: should capture key technical insight accurately

acceptance_criteria.description: LLM fails to generate summary → Synthesis continues → Finding created with summary: undefined, no error
acceptance_criteria.test_function: should return undefined when LLM fails, not throw error

acceptance_criteria.description: Summary > 150 chars → LLM returns long summary → Summary truncated to 150 chars with ellipsis
acceptance_criteria.test_function: should truncate summaries longer than 150 characters with ellipsis

acceptance_criteria.description: Source is video → Summary generated → Summary captures video topic without watching
acceptance_criteria.test_function: should generate summary for video sources

implementation_summary: Added generateFindingSummary function to LLM module that generates 2-3 line summaries (80-150 chars) for findings using AI. Integrated summary generation into the daily report synthesis flow, processing top 20 findings that lack summaries. Function handles failures gracefully by returning undefined and logging errors. All 5 acceptance criteria verified with integration tests.
